name: Riverview
description_short: Riverview is a classic 1950s-style movie theater in Minneapolis showing current films and special screenings, not a financial services company.
description_long:
Riverview Theater is a historic neighborhood movie theater located at 3800 42nd Avenue South in Minneapolis, Minnesota. Built in 1956, it has been a cultural anchor in the Longfellow neighborhood for decades, serving the local community with entertainment and cinema experiences. The theater was designed with mid-century modern aesthetics and has been maintained to preserve its authentic 1950s character while incorporating modern technology. It operates as a single-screen cinema venue, not a financial services provider of any kind.

The theater offers movie screenings, special events, and merchandise sales. Their current offerings include theatrical releases like "The Super Mario Bros Galaxy Movie" in both 2D and 3D formats, with multiple showtimes daily. They also host special screenings, sporting event broadcasts, and community film premieres. The venue is available for visitors to enjoy films in a restored classic auditorium equipped with modern projection and digital sound systems.

Riverview distinguishes itself through its commitment to historic preservation combined with selective technological upgrades. The theater features original architectural elements from 1949 (stage curtain), updated seating installed in 2007 with cup holders, period-appropriate mid-century furnishings, and a distinctive marquee at East 38th Street and 42nd Avenue. The lobby maintains original materials including terrazzo tile flooring, copper drinking fountains, and mid-century lighting fixtures, creating an authentic retro cinema experience.

Riverview Theater is fundamentally a movie theater business and has been miscategorized. It provides no financial services, lending products, credit solutions, or cash access services. The website contains only entertainment and cinema information. This company should not be in any consumer finance category, as it operates exclusively in the entertainment industry.

Neighborhood residents in Minneapolis Longfellow area
Community members interested in special screenings and local film premieres
diagnosis: Riverview Theater has been fundamentally miscategorized.
